mapper.sql: id, process_key, process_instance_id, business_key, task_id, task_key, task_name, node_label, page_label, form_key, form_label, action_type, comment, approval_comment, reject_reason, system_remark, variable_snapshot_json, form_snapshot_json, operator_id, operator_name, created_at
mapper.select: select from process_instance_audit_log where process_instance_id = #{processInstanceId} order by created_at asc, id asc
mapper.insert: insert into process_instance_audit_log ( process_key, process_instance_id, business_key, task_id, task_key, task_name, node_label, page_label, form_key, form_label, action_type, comment, approval_comment, reject_reason, system_remark, variable_snapshot_json, form_snapshot_json, operator_id, operator_name, created_at ) values ( #{processKey}, #{processInstanceId}, #{businessKey}, #{taskId}, #{taskKey}, #{taskName}, #{nodeLabel}, #{pageLabel}, #{formKey}, #{formLabel}, #{actionType}, #{comment}, #{approvalComment}, #{rejectReason}, #{systemRemark}, #{variableSnapshotJson}, #{formSnapshotJson}, #{operatorId}, #{operatorName}, #{createdAt} )
